title: phlomoides lamiifolia
intro: Phlomoides lamiifolia, also known as Prangos ferulacea, is a plant species in the carrot family that is native to the Middle East and Central Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Phlomoides lamiifolia include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
